meta.title: OpenClaw - Free Desktop Pet Lobster | Pixel Art Virtual Pet for Mac & Windows
meta.description: OpenClaw is a free desktop pet app. Adopt your own cyber lobster! Available as a web app and desktop download for Mac & Windows. Pixel art style, skill unlocking, interactive adventures.
meta.ogTitle: OpenClaw - Your Free Desktop Pet Lobster
meta.ogDesc: Adopt a cyber lobster on your desktop! Free pixel-art pet with skill unlocking, interactive adventures. Available for Mac & Windows.

hero.subtitle: OpenClaw · Your Personal Desktop Lobster Pet
hero.desc: Adopt your own cyber lobster! OpenClaw brings a brand-new desktop pet experience. Web version is live — play instantly in your browser. Interactive fun, skill unlocking & pixel-art adventures.

aff.title: Your friend invited you to try OpenClaw!
aff.tip: Open the app after installing, enter the invite code to get bonus rewards

features.title: Why Choose OpenClaw?
features.subtitle: A fun, adorable & intelligent cyber lobster that makes your desktop come alive.
features.card1Desc: A beautiful pixel-art desktop pet — retro yet modern. Feed, play with, and train your lobster. Watch it grow day by day.
features.card2Desc: Earn XP through interactions and unlock unique lobster skills. Every lobster's growth path is different — create your one-of-a-kind desktop companion.
features.card3Desc: Supports both macOS and Windows. No matter what computer you use, you can have a desktop lobster to keep you company while working or studying.
features.card4Desc: OpenClaw is free to download with all core features included. Need more powerful AI capabilities? Premium features available on demand.

stats.title: The Numbers Speak
stats.subtitle: OpenClaw is a completely free desktop pet app, trusted by over 10,000 users worldwide.

credibility.title: World-Class Team, Premium Desktop Experience
credibility.subtitle: Our core team members come from top global universities, specializing in game interaction & AI technology.
credibility.techSubtitle: Core team members bring experience from leading global tech companies.

compare.title: Why Choose OpenClaw?
compare.subtitle: See how OpenClaw stacks up against other desktop pets.

quote.text: A desktop pet is more than entertainment — it's an innovative way to boost productivity and provide emotional companionship. We've infused cutting-edge technology into a tiny desktop lobster, making every interaction a delightful surprise.
quote.author: OpenClaw Team
quote.role: Core Team · Top University Background · 10+ Years Experience

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about OpenClaw.
faq.a1: Yes! OpenClaw is free to download for both Mac and Windows. All core desktop pet features are completely free. Some premium features (like AI compute power) can be unlocked as needed.
faq.q2: What operating systems does OpenClaw support?
faq.a2: OpenClaw currently supports macOS and Windows. Whether you use a Mac or a Windows PC, you can download and enjoy OpenClaw.
faq.q3: What interactive features does OpenClaw have?
faq.a3: OpenClaw offers rich interactive features: pixel-art raising, feeding, playing, training, skill unlocking, desktop adventures, and more. Your lobster grows through interactions, unlocking unique skills to become your one-of-a-kind desktop companion.
faq.a4: Visit the official website lobster.pet to download OpenClaw for free on Mac and Windows. Click the download buttons at the top of the page and select your system version.
faq.q5: Will it affect my computer's performance?
faq.a5: Not at all. OpenClaw is carefully optimized with minimal resource usage (about 100-200MB RAM). It won't affect your normal work or gaming. It sits quietly on your desktop, waiting for your interaction.

cta.title: Ready to Adopt Your Desktop Lobster?
cta.subtitle: The web version is live! No download needed — play instantly in your browser. Desktop version for Mac/Windows also available.

footer.seoText: OpenClaw (lobster.pet) is a free desktop pet app for Mac and Windows. Pixel-art interactive raising, skill unlocking, and fun companionship. Download OpenClaw now and adopt an adorable cyber lobster on your desktop.
